title: DistCorrectTargetSeq Property
description: Specifies a vision sequence to detect the calibration target in lens distortion correction and camera tilt correction used for the vision calibration.
notes:
Specify DistCorrectTargetSeq for all calibrations where lens distortion correction and camera tilt correction are used.  For details, refer to Vision Guide Software  7. Vision Calibration.

See Also: DistCorrectTargetSeq Property
